last_slate_signature.description: Stable hash of the poll-compatible slate last submitted to voters.

last_poll_tick.description: Heartbeat tick count at which the slate was last polled.

last_poll_profile.description: Voter profile used for the last high-ROI poll.

last_poll_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last scheduled high-ROI poll.

last_skip_reason.description: Most recent reason a poll was skipped.
